# Ng Brutalism

> Ng Brutalism is a neo-brutalist Angular UI library by Khang Tran. Built with signals, zoneless change detection, and Tailwind v4. It ships as @ng-brutalism/ui on npm. Bold borders, offset shadows, punchy colors.

- Author: Khang Tran (https://github.com/khangtrannn)
- Repository: https://github.com/khangtrannn/ng-brutalism
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ng-brutalism/ui
- License: MIT

## Pages

- [Ng Brutalism — Neo-Brutalist Angular UI Library](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/): The neo-brutalist Angular UI library. Signals, zoneless, Tailwind v4. Bold borders, offset shadows, and punchy colors — drop in brutalist Angular components and ship loud.
- [Introduction | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/docs/introduction/): Get started with Ng Brutalism — a neo-brutalist Angular UI library built with signals, zoneless change detection, and Tailwind v4.
- [Installation | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/docs/installation/): Install @ng-brutalism/ui in your Angular project. Requires a modern Angular setup, Tailwind v4, and Node 20+.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Button | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/button/): Neo-brutalist Button component for Angular. Hard borders, offset shadows, and multiple variants — built with directive APIs and signals.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Card | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/card/): Neo-brutalist Card component for Angular. Bold content blocks with thick borders and offset shadows.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Dialog | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/dialog/): Neo-brutalist Dialog (modal) component for Angular. Accessible native brutalist modal with keyboard focus management.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Accordion | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/accordion/): Neo-brutalist Accordion component for Angular. Dense disclosure panels with keyboard navigation and signal-driven state.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Input | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/input/): Neo-brutalist Input component for Angular. Sharp form fields with strong focus states and Tailwind v4 tokens.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Input Group | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/input-group/): Neo-brutalist Input Group component for Angular. Compose inputs with prefix and suffix slots in a brutalist wrapper.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Avatar | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/avatar/): Neo-brutalist Avatar component for Angular. Bold profile images with hard borders and offset shadow styling.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Badge | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/badge/): Neo-brutalist Badge component for Angular. Punchy status labels with thick borders and high-contrast colors.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Checkbox | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/checkbox/): Neo-brutalist Checkbox component for Angular. Accessible checkbox with strong focus states and brutalist styling.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Image Card | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/image-card/): Neo-brutalist Image Card component for Angular. Bold media cards with thick borders and offset shadows.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Label | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/label/): Neo-brutalist Label component for Angular. Bold form labels with strong typography and brutalist styling.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Marquee | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/marquee/): Ng Brutalism Marquee component for Angular. Continuous scrolling ticker with bold borders and configurable speed.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Select | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/select/): Neo-brutalist Select component for Angular. Custom dropdown with bold styling and full keyboard support.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Textarea | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/textarea/): Neo-brutalist Textarea component for Angular. Multi-line input with sharp borders and brutalist focus states.
- [Neo-Brutalist Angular Title | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/components/title/): Neo-brutalist Title component for Angular. Decorative heading with custom wave underline and mixed content support.
- [Portfolio Showcase | Ng Brutalism](https://ngbrutalism.khangtran.dev/showcase/portfolio/): Portfolio showcase built with Ng Brutalism — see the neo-brutalist Angular UI library in action.
